scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); const path = 'public/media/videos/naroa_divergence.mp4'; const tmp = 'naroa_divergence.tmp'; const hasVideo = fs.existsSync(path); if (hasVideo) fs.renameSync(path, tmp); try { require('child_process').execSync('astro build', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } finally { if (hasVideo && fs.existsSync(tmp)) fs.renameSync(tmp, path); }"
